sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76739" key="pala/qion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλάθ-ιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> foreg., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0586.tlg001:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">88</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παλάσιον</foreign>.</entryFree>
